conservative.name: Call For Aid
conservative.requirements: 3 favour, close range to the target. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Choose yourself or an ally within close range. Remove 1 tracking token from a brief condition that character is suffering

boon.description: The target may recover 1 stress or 1 fatigue
If this action was successful, the condition may instead be removed entirely

bane.description: Suffer 1 stress. Then, if your target was an ally, the condition is moved from your target to you. (It retains the same number of tracking tokens, less any removed by this blessing)

reckless.name: Call For Aid
reckless.requirements: 3 favour, close range to the target. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Choose an ally within close range who is suffering from a brief condition. Move that condition from the ally to you (it retains the same number of tracking tokens)
As above, plus you may move 1 more condition from the same or a different target within close range

boon.description: The target may recover 1 stress or 1 fatigue
If this action was successful, the condition may instead be removed entirely
